text:
(In reply to Graham Perrin from comment #12)

>Please, can you describe the problems?

I see...minidumps right?
https://docs.freebsd.org/en/books/developers-handbook/kerneldebug/

Yes i am subscribed to freebsd-wireless, iwlwifi definitely has bugs. My much older T450 can transfer 10mb/s whereas my X250 is at 2.6mb/s max (same band same distance to router same everything...except chipset)

>I hesitate before referencing or quoting here, because Bugzilla may be not well-suited to tuning-related discussions …

Yes wrong place absolutely. But it's not about the tuning, but the crash ;)
